nodes.title: Models
widgets_values:
Most models can be found here:
https://huggingface.co/Kijai/LTXV2_comfy


GGUF: https://huggingface.co/unsloth/LTX-2-GGUF

In theory, GGUF Q8 should be slightly slower but give better quality than fp8.

nodes.title: Prompt
widgets_values: Distant view of a street slowly rotating upwards. Camera zooms in to focus on the people walking down the street. A voice explains: "This is our special strange city".

nodes.title: Prompt (Negative)
widgets_values: blurry, low quality, still, frames, watermark, overlay, titles, blurbox, subtitles, still, cutscene, cut, scene cut, anime, animation, cgi, drawing, music, monochrome, grayscale, black bars

Minimal frame injection workflow. No upscale. Has the January 2026 quality improvement nodes from LTX and Kijai.
Depends on VideoHelperSuite and KJNodes, can be installed in the Manager.
